hero.title: 1-on-1 Tech Education, Tailored to You.
hero.description: Learn Python, SQL, TypeScript, Notion, and more at your own pace. I teach curious minds of all ages — from first-time coders to working professionals.

why_choose_path.title: Why Learn with Me?
why_choose_path.introduction: My teaching is built around your learning style. I offer hands-on, project-based sessions that make complex topics approachable and fun — whether you're a beginner or a seasoned professional.
why_choose_path.young_learners_description: Engaging and interactive sessions designed to build foundational tech skills and foster a love for learning.
why_choose_path.adult_learners_description: Practical, in-depth mentorship to enhance your skills, solve real-world problems, and advance your career.

skills.title: Python Fundamentals Path
skills.description: A guided journey through the core concepts of Python, with practical exercises and real-world applications.

skills.title: SQL Database Essentials
skills.description: Learn to design, query, and manage relational databases effectively.

skills.title: TypeScript Web Development
skills.description: Build robust and scalable web applications using TypeScript and modern frameworks.

skills.title: Notion Productivity & Organization
skills.description: Unlock Notion's full potential for personal organization, project management, and team collaboration.

skills.title: HTML & CSS: Building Blocks Path
skills.description: Start your web development journey by mastering the foundational languages of the internet.

skills.title: React.js: Component Design Showcase
skills.description: Dive into React to build interactive and dynamic user interfaces.

skills.title: Git & GitHub: The Developer's Blueprint
skills.description: Learn essential version control for collaborative coding and project management.

how_journey_works.title: How It Works
how_journey_works.step1_description: Browse the available learning paths and pick the skills you want to build.
how_journey_works.step2_description: Fill out the contact form to share your goals and schedule a free introductory chat.
how_journey_works.step3_description: Jump into your personalized 1-on-1 sessions and start building real skills.

success_stories.title: What Students Are Saying
success_stories.testimonial1_text: Learning Python with Kunanon was incredible! The lessons were so clear and fun, and I built my first game. Highly recommend for kids!
success_stories.testimonial2_text: I needed to pick up TypeScript for a new role, and Kunanon's guidance was invaluable. The personalized approach helped me grasp complex concepts quickly. A true expert!

common_questions.title: Frequently Asked Questions
common_questions.q1_title: What is the typical session format?
common_questions.q1_description: Sessions are typically 1-on-1, conducted online via video call, and are highly interactive with a focus on hands-on coding and problem-solving.
common_questions.q2_title: Can I customize my learning path?
common_questions.q2_description: Absolutely! While we have suggested paths, I work with each student to tailor the curriculum to their specific goals and interests.
common_questions.q3_title: What age groups do you teach?
common_questions.q3_description: I teach both young learners (typically 8+) and adults. My teaching style adapts to suit the age and experience level of the student.

call_to_action.title: Ready to Get Started?
call_to_action.description1: Take the first step toward building new skills. I'm here to help.
call_to_action.description2: Drop your contact details below and I'll reach out to discuss your learning goals.
